method: Unsupervised ML validation (K-Means, Ward, DBSCAN, GMM, Gap statistic)

consensus.note: GMM-BIC and Gap unreliable at n=11 (overfit/negative gaps); silhouette consensus = k=2

reconciliation: ML groups by variance (8+3); causal lag analysis separates PennyMac's variance as monotonic trend, not regime coupling. Both agree Freedom+NewRez are the regime pair.
status: STRUCTURE LOCKED — next test: 2026 HMDA (UWM falsification)
